sourcePrompt: A Dragunov SVD sniper rifle, the NVA designated-marksman weapon, about one point two meters long and noticeably slender. A long thin barrel with a slotted flash hider, a skeletonized wooden thumbhole stock with an open cut-out, a short curved magazine, and a long telescopic scope riding above the receiver on a side mount. Reddish wood and blued steel, elegant and lethal.
handEdit: scope lowered onto thicker mounts + lens glow muted + magazine seated; offline rebake
